# Explicit translation drops (field paths relative to ingress wire).
# Lines starting with # are comments. Blank lines ignored.
# Update this file in the same PR as fidelity work that starts preserving a field.

# Multi-choice (policy: n=1 only; n>1 rejected before translate)
openai.n>1
google.generation_config.candidate_count>1

# Sampling / determinism extras
openai.logprobs
openai.top_logprobs
openai.logit_bias

# Seed / penalties: preserved on OpenAI (and Google seed); Anthropic Messages
# has no equivalent — Anthropic egress omits without error (#38/#39).
# openai.seed, openai.frequency_penalty, openai.presence_penalty are canonical
# fields; they appear on OpenAI egress but are dropped on Anthropic egress.
anthropic.egress.seed
anthropic.egress.frequency_penalty
anthropic.egress.presence_penalty

# response_format / output_config: json_schema maps; bare json_object has no
# Anthropic native equivalent without a schema (dropped on Anthropic egress).
anthropic.egress.response_format.json_object

# Anthropic prompt caching breakpoints — passthrough only (#41 Option B)
anthropic.system[].cache_control
anthropic.messages[].content[].cache_control
anthropic.tools[].cache_control

# OpenAI stream options not rebuilt on non-OpenAI egress
openai.stream_options

# Vendor-specific metadata dropped cross-family
openai.user
